zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance of York於大約1375年出生在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素時，她的父親Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York35歲，母親Isabella de Castilla21歲。她和Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1416年11月29日在她的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在英國波克夏雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance of York于大约1375年出生在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素时，她的父亲Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York35岁，母亲Isabella de Castilla21岁。她和Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1416年11月29日在她的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在英国波克夏雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance of York was born about 1375, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, her father, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, was 35 and her mother, Isabella de Castilla, was 21. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. She died on 29 November 1416, in her hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Reading, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance of York est née environ 1375, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Castilla, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. Elle est décédée le 29 novembre 1416, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance of York um 1375 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York 35 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Castilla 21. Sie hatte mit Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. November 1416 im Alter von 42 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Reading, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance of York è nata il circa 1375 nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, sua padre, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Castilla, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. Morì il 29 novembre 1416, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Reading, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance of Yorkが約1375年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで生まれた時，父Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of Yorkは35歳，母Isabella de Castillaは21歳であった。彼女はThomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucsterとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1416年11月29日に故郷で42歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance of York(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Castilla(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 11월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance of York nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Castilla, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. Ela faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1416, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance of York родилась около 1375 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund of Langley 1st Duke of York было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Castilla, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. Она умерла 29 ноября 1416 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Thomas Le Despencer Earl of Gloucster. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1416, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
